<!--
Code change PR.

May include doc updates alongside the code (entity comments, design-doc updates, README/CONTRIBUTING wording that follows from the change). Pure documentation changes belong in the Documentation template.

If this PR changes how the project thinks — adds a new pattern that contradicts an ADR, deviates from a stated principle, sets a new architectural precedent — stop and open an issue using the "ADR or principle change" template instead. Per CONTRIBUTING.md, the project does not bend principles in code PRs.

Comment blocks are for you — keep, edit, or delete them as you go.
-->

## What changed

<!-- Brief. The diff says what; this section says it in human terms. Closes/refs an issue if relevant. -->

## Why

<!-- The "why" lives here, not in the diff. -->

## Tests

<!-- What was added or changed. If nothing, say why. -->

## Notes for review

<!-- Optional. Anything reviewers should know that isn't obvious from the diff: known weaknesses, follow-up planned, areas you'd like extra eyes on. -->
